   504→│ │ Train     │ Fleet         │ Alerts                         ││
   505→│ │ KS-001    │ Kinki Sharyo  │ All            [Remove]        ││
   506→│ │ AL-045    │ Alstom        │ PM Only        [Remove]        ││
   507→│ │ KS-023    │ Kinki Sharyo  │ All            [Remove]        ││
   508→│ │                                                             ││
   509→│ │ [+ Add Train Subscription]                                  ││
   510→│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘│
   511→│                                                                 │
   512→│ ROUTE SUBSCRIPTIONS                                             │
   513→│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐│
   514→│ │ [✓] R-BLUE-01 (Blue Line Express)                          ││
   515→│ │ [✓] R-RED-01 (Red Line Local)                              ││
   516→│ │ [ ] R-GREEN-01 (Green Line)                                ││
   517→│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘│
   518→│                                                                 │
   519→└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   520→```
   521→
   522→---
   523→
   524→## 8. Alert Actions & Workflows
   525→
   526→### 8.1 Quick Actions
   527→
   528→| Action | Icon | Description |
   529→|--------|------|-------------|
   530→| Schedule PM | 📅 | Opens PM scheduling modal |
   531→| View Train | 🚂 | Navigates to train details |
   532→| View Analysis | 📊 | Opens relevant analysis view |
   533→| Acknowledge | ✓ | Marks alert as acknowledged |
   534→| Snooze | 💤 | Delays reminder (15m/1h/4h/Tomorrow) |
   535→| Dismiss | × | Dismisses (logs action) |
   536→| Share | 📤 | Shares via email/Slack |
   537→| Comment | 💬 | Adds comment for audit |
   538→
   539→### 8.2 Snooze Options
   540→
   541→```
   542→┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   543→│ Snooze for:                                 │
   544→│                                             │
   545→│ ○ 15 minutes                               │
   546→│ ○ 1 hour                                   │
   547→│ ○ 4 hours                                  │
   548→│ ○ Tomorrow morning (9:00 AM)               │
   549→│ ○ Custom...                                │
   550→│                                             │
   551→│ Reason (optional):                         │
   552→│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐│
   553→│ │ Waiting for parts delivery              ││
   554→│ └─────────────────────────────────────────┘│
   555→│                                             │
   556→│              [Cancel]  [Snooze]             │
   557→└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   558→```
   559→
   560→### 8.3 Bulk Actions
   561→
   562→| Action | Effect |
   563→|--------|--------|
   564→| Mark All Read | Marks all visible as read |
   565→| Acknowledge Selected | Batch acknowledge |
   566→| Snooze Selected | Batch snooze with same duration |
   567→| Export Selected | Export to CSV/PDF |
   568→| Clear Resolved | Remove resolved notifications |
   569→
   570→---
   571→
   572→## 9. Notification Sounds & Haptics
   573→
   574→### 9.1 Sound Configuration
   575→
   576→| Priority | Default Sound | Description |
   577→|----------|---------------|-------------|
   578→| P1 Critical | Urgent alarm (3 beeps) | Cannot be muted |
   579→| P2 Warning | Alert tone (2 beeps) | Can be muted |
   580→| P3 Info | Subtle chime (1 beep) | Can be muted |
   581→| P4 Success | Soft ping | Can be muted |
   582→
   583→### 9.2 Mobile Haptics
   584→
   585→| Priority | Haptic Pattern |
   586→|----------|----------------|
   587→| P1 Critical | Strong vibration (3x) |
   588→| P2 Warning | Medium vibration (2x) |
   589→| P3 Info | Light vibration (1x) |
   590→| P4 Success | Subtle tap |
   591→
   592→---
   593→
   594→## 10. Accessibility
   595→
   596→### 10.1 WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
   597→
   598→- **Color**: Not sole indicator; icons + text labels
   599→- **Contrast**: 4.5:1 minimum for text
   600→- **Focus**: Visible focus indicators
   601→- **Screen Readers**: ARIA live regions for dynamic notifications
   602→- **Keyboard**: Full keyboard navigation
   603→
   604→### 10.2 ARIA Implementation
   605→
   606→```html
   607→<!-- Toast Notification -->
   608→<div role="alert" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true">
   609→  <span class="sr-only">Success notification:</span>
   610→  Assignment saved successfully
   611→</div>
   612→
   613→<!-- Critical Alert -->
   614→<div role="alertdialog" aria-live="assertive" aria-modal="true">
   615→  <span class="sr-only">Critical alert:</span>
   616→  PM Overdue: KS-045 requires immediate attention
   617→</div>
   618→
   619→<!-- Notification Badge -->
   620→<button aria-label="Notifications, 7 unread items">
   621→  <span class="badge">7</span>
   622→</button>
   623→```
   624→
   625→---
   626→
   627→## 11. Gestalt Principles Applied
   628→
   629→### 11.1 Proximity
   630→- Group related actions together
   631→- Alert metadata clustered (time, category, priority)
   632→- Settings grouped by function
   633→
   634→### 11.2 Similarity
   635→- Consistent color coding across all notification types
   636→- Uniform button styles for actions
   637→- Same icon language throughout
   638→
   639→### 11.3 Enclosure
   640→- Clear card boundaries for each notification
   641→- Panel borders for notification center
   642→- Modal frames for critical alerts
   643→
   644→### 11.4 Continuity
   645→- Left-to-right reading flow for actions
   646→- Timeline ordering (newest first)
   647→- Escalation tier visual progression
   648→
   649→### 11.5 Figure-Ground
   650→- Elevated toast notifications (shadow)
   651→- Modal overlay for blocking alerts
   652→- Unread vs read visual differentiation
   653→
   654→### 11.6 Common Fate
   655→- Batch selection animations
   656→- Grouped notification bundling
   657→- Synchronized dismiss animations
   658→
   659→---
   660→
   661→## 12. States & Transitions
   662→
   663→### 12.1 Notification States
   664→
   665→| State | Visual Treatment |
   666→|-------|------------------|
   667→| Unread | Bold text, colored indicator dot |
   668→| Read | Normal weight, no indicator |
   669→| Acknowledged | Checkmark icon, muted colors |
   670→| Snoozed | Clock icon, italic text |
   671→| Resolved | Strikethrough, light gray |
   672→| Escalated | Red border, escalation indicator |
   673→
   674→### 12.2 Animation Specifications
   675→
   676→| Animation | Duration | Easing |
   677→|-----------|----------|--------|
   678→| Toast enter | 300ms | ease-out |
   679→| Toast exit | 200ms | ease-in |
   680→| Badge pulse | 1000ms | ease-in-out (loop) |
   681→| Mark read | 150ms | ease-out |
   682→| Dismiss | 200ms | ease-in |
   683→| Expand/collapse | 200ms | ease-out |
   684→
   685→---
   686→
   687→## 13. Integration Points
   688→
   689→### 13.1 External Systems
   690→
   691→| System | Integration Type | Alert Types |
   692→|--------|------------------|-------------|
   693→| Maximo | Bi-directional | Work orders, asset status |
   694→| Email Server | Outbound | All email notifications |
   695→| SMS Gateway | Outbound | P1 critical alerts |
   696→| Slack/Teams | Outbound (webhook) | Configurable |
   697→| Mobile App | Push (FCM/APNs) | All push notifications |
   698→
   699→### 13.2 Webhook Payload
   700→
   701→```json
   702→{
   703→  "id": "notif-001",
   704→  "timestamp": "2026-01-08T12:34:56Z",
   705→  "priority": "P1",
   706→  "category": "MAINTENANCE",
   707→  "type": "PM_OVERDUE",
   708→  "title": "PM Overdue: KS-045",
   709→  "body": "Train exceeded PM2 threshold by 1,234 km",
   710→  "trainId": "KS-045",
   711→  "fleetType": "KINKI_SHARYO",
   712→  "data": {
   713→    "currentMileage": 46234,
   714→    "threshold": 45000,
   715→    "overdue": 1234
   716→  },
   717→  "actions": [
   718→    { "id": "schedule", "label": "Schedule PM", "url": "/schedule/pm?train=KS-045" },
   719→    { "id": "view", "label": "View Details", "url": "/trains/KS-045" }
   720→  ]
   721→}
   722→```
   723→
   724→---
   725→
   726→## 14. Analytics & Metrics
   727→
   728→### 14.1 Key Metrics
   729→
   730→| Metric | Description | Target |
   731→|--------|-------------|--------|
   732→| Acknowledgment Rate | % alerts acknowledged | >90% |
   733→| Response Time | Time to first action | <15 min (P1) |
   734→| Escalation Rate | % alerts escalated | <10% |
   735→| Dismiss Rate | % alerts dismissed without action | <20% |
   736→| Channel Effectiveness | Opens per channel | Track trend |
   737→
   738→### 14.2 Alert Dashboard Metrics
   739→
   740→```
   741→┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   742→│ Alert Analytics - Last 30 Days                                  │
   743→├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
   744→│                                                                 │
   745→│ Total Alerts: 1,234    Acknowledged: 1,111 (90%)               │
   746→│                                                                 │
   747→│ By Priority:           By Category:                            │
   748→│ P1: 23 (2%)           Maintenance: 456 (37%)                   │
   749→│ P2: 345 (28%)         Mileage: 321 (26%)                       │
   750→│ P3: 567 (46%)         Assignment: 234 (19%)                    │
   751→│ P4: 299 (24%)         Other: 223 (18%)                         │
   752→│                                                                 │
   753→│ Avg Response Time:     Escalation Rate:                        │
   754→│ P1: 8 min ✓           5.2% ✓                                   │
   755→│ P2: 2.3 hr ✓          3.1% ✓                                   │
   756→│                                                                 │
   757→└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   758→```
   759→
   760→---
   761→
   762→## 15. Unknown Unknowns (Risks & Considerations)
   763→
   764→### Identified During Design
   765→
   766→1. **Alert Fatigue Threshold**: At what point do users start ignoring alerts?
   767→2. **Cross-Shift Handoff**: How to handle alerts during shift changes?
   768→3. **Timezone Handling**: Users in different timezones seeing same alerts
   769→4. **Alert Correlation**: Related alerts should be grouped (e.g., PM overdue + budget impact)
   770→5. **False Positive Rate**: Threshold tuning to reduce noise
   771→6. **Network Reliability**: Push notification delivery in low-connectivity areas
   772→7. **Audit Requirements**: How long to retain alert history?
   773→8. **GDPR Compliance**: User data in notifications
   774→9. **Multi-Language Support**: Alert content localization
   775→10. **Role Change Impact**: What happens to subscriptions when role changes?
   776→11. **Delegation During Absence**: Auto-forwarding when user is OOO
   777→12. **Alert Storm Prevention**: Cascade prevention when system failure affects many trains
   778→13. **Acknowledgment Verification**: Ensuring the right person acknowledged
   779→14. **Alert De-duplication**: Same condition triggering multiple alerts
   780→15. **Historical Alert Replay**: Ability to replay alerts for training
   781→16. **Alert Priority Override**: Can users elevate/demote priorities?
   782→17. **Integration Failure Alerts**: What if Maximo sync fails silently?
   783→18. **Mobile App Permissions**: Users denying notification permissions
   784→19. **Email Deliverability**: Alerts going to spam folders
   785→20. **Alert Content Security**: Sensitive data in notification bodies
   786→
   787→---
   788→
   789→## 16. Responsive Design
   790→
   791→### 16.1 Desktop (>=1200px)
   792→- Full notification center panel (400px width)
   793→- Inline notifications span content width
   794→- Modal notifications centered (max 500px width)
   795→
   796→### 16.2 Tablet (768px - 1199px)
   797→- Notification panel as slide-over
   798→- Condensed notification cards
   799→- Touch-friendly action buttons
   800→
   801→### 16.3 Mobile (<768px)
   802→- Full-screen notification center
   803→- Swipe gestures for quick actions
   804→- Bottom sheet for actions menu
   805→- Large touch targets (48px minimum)
   806→
   807→---
   808→
   809→## 17. Implementation Notes
   810→
   811→### 17.1 Technology Stack Recommendations
   812→
   813→| Component | Recommended Tech |
   814→|-----------|------------------|
   815→| Real-time delivery | WebSocket / Server-Sent Events |
   816→| Push notifications | Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) |
   817→| Email delivery | SendGrid / AWS SES |
   818→| SMS delivery | Twilio |
   819→| Message queue | RabbitMQ / AWS SQS |
   820→| State management | Redux / Zustand |
   821→| Animations | Framer Motion |
   822→
   823→### 17.2 Performance Targets
   824→
   825→| Metric | Target |
   826→|--------|--------|
   827→| Notification render | <100ms |
   828→| WebSocket connection | <500ms |
   829→| Push delivery | <2 seconds |
   830→| Email delivery | <30 seconds |
   831→| SMS delivery | <10 seconds |
   832→| Panel load (100 items) | <200ms |
   833→
   834→---
   835→
   836→## 18. Change Log
   837→
   838→| Version | Date | Changes |
   839→|---------|------|---------|
   840→| 1.0 | 2026-01-08 | Initial specification |
   841→
   842→---
   843→
   844→*Document prepared for MILEAGE-UX-009*
   845→*Rolling Stock Mileage Management System*
   846→

# Alert & Notification System UX Specification

## MILEAGE-UX-009 - Rolling Stock Mileage Management

**Version:** 1.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-01-08
**Status:** Complete

---

## 1. Overview

### Purpose
Design a comprehensive alert and notification system for the Rolling Stock Mileage Management platform that keeps stakeholders informed about critical events while preventing notification fatigue.

### Scope
- 128 trains (49 Kinki Sharyo + 79 Alstom)
- 12-year contract period
- Multiple user roles (Operations, Maintenance, Management, Executive)
- RFQ Section 5 compliance: "Email notification for underrun and overrun mileage"

### Design Principles
1. **Assist, Don't Impede**: Notifications help users complete tasks
2. **Context Matters**: Provide actionable information
3. **User Control**: Prevent fatigue with customization
4. **Tiered Urgency**: Not all alerts warrant same attention
5. **Clear Escalation**: Automatic escalation for unacknowledged critical alerts

### Sources Referenced
- [Smashing Magazine: Design Guidelines For Better Notifications UX](https://www.smashingmagazine.com/2025/07/design-guidelines-better-notifications-ux/)
- [Toptal: Comprehensive Guide to Notification Design](https://www.toptal.com/designers/ux/notification-design)
- [MagicBell: Notification System Design](https://www.magicbell.com/blog/notification-system-design)
- [Carbon Design System: Notification Pattern](https://carbondesignsystem.com/patterns/notification-pattern/)
- [Fleetio: Fleet Management Notifications](https://www.fleetio.com/features/fleet-management-notifications)
- [Pitstop: Alert Management Workflows](https://pitstopconnect.com/2024/03/05/5-steps-effective-alert-management-workflows-fleet-operations/)

---

## 2. Alert Categories & Priorities

### 2.1 Priority Levels

| Priority | Label | Color | Response Time | Auto-Escalate |
|----------|-------|-------|---------------|---------------|
| P1 | Critical | #DC2626 (Red) | Immediate | 15 min |
| P2 | Warning | #F59E0B (Amber) | 4 hours | 24 hours |
| P3 | Info | #3B82F6 (Blue) | 24 hours | Never |
| P4 | Success | #22C55E (Green) | N/A | Never |

### 2.2 Alert Categories

#### Maintenance Alerts
| Alert Type | Priority | Trigger Condition | Audience |
|------------|----------|-------------------|----------|
| PM Overdue | P1 | Train past PM threshold | Maintenance, Ops |
| PM Critical | P1 | Train >= 95% of PM threshold | Maintenance |
| PM Approaching | P2 | Train >= 80% of PM threshold | Maintenance |
| PM Scheduled | P3 | PM scheduled within 7 days | Maintenance, Ops |
| PM Completed | P4 | PM successfully completed | Maintenance, Ops |
| Inspection Failed | P1 | Vehicle inspection item failed | Maintenance |
| Fault Code Triggered | P2 | OBD fault code detected | Maintenance |

#### Mileage Alerts (RFQ Section 5)
| Alert Type | Priority | Trigger Condition | Audience |
|------------|----------|-------------------|----------|
| Mileage Overrun | P2 | Train >110% of target mileage | Operations, Management |
| Mileage Underrun | P2 | Train <90% of target mileage | Operations, Management |
| Fleet Imbalance | P2 | Fleet deviation >15% | Operations |
| Mileage Forecast Alert | P3 | Projected PM date conflict | Maintenance |
| Daily Mileage Missing | P2 | No mileage recorded for 24+ hours | Operations |

#### Assignment Alerts
| Alert Type | Priority | Trigger Condition | Audience |
|------------|----------|-------------------|----------|
| No Suitable Train | P1 | Cannot assign any train to route | Operations |
| Assignment Conflict | P2 | Double-booking detected | Operations |
| Schedule Not Published | P2 | Schedule not published by cutoff | Operations |
| Low Recommendation Score | P3 | Best score <50% | Operations |
| Assignment Changed | P3 | External system modified assignment | Operations |

#### Resource Alerts
| Alert Type | Priority | Trigger Condition | Audience |
|------------|----------|-------------------|----------|
| Man-Hour Shortage | P1 | Gap < -1000 man-hours | Management |
| Track Overbooked | P1 | Track utilization >100% | Maintenance |
| Resource Near Capacity | P2 | Utilization >90% | Maintenance |
| Overtime Required | P3 | Gap requires overtime | Management |

#### Cost Alerts
| Alert Type | Priority | Trigger Condition | Audience |
|------------|----------|-------------------|----------|
| Budget Exceeded | P1 | Category >110% of budget | Management, Finance |
| Budget Warning | P2 | Category >95% of budget | Management |
| Cost Variance | P3 | Monthly variance >5% | Management |

#### System Alerts
| Alert Type | Priority | Trigger Condition | Audience |
|------------|----------|-------------------|----------|
| Integration Failure | P1 | Maximo sync failed | IT, Admin |
| Data Sync Delayed | P2 | Sync >30 minutes late | IT |
| Report Generation Failed | P2 | Scheduled report failed | Admin |
| Session Expiring | P3 | User session ending soon | All |

---

## 3. Notification Types

### 3.1 Toast Notifications (Transient)

**Use For:** Real-time feedback, confirmations, non-critical updates

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ✓  Assignment saved successfully                  × │
│    Train KS-001 assigned to Route R-BLUE-01         │
│                                          [Undo]     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Specifications:**
- Position: Top-right corner
- Duration: 5 seconds (auto-dismiss)
- Max visible: 3 stacked
- Animation: Slide in from right
- Action: Single CTA (e.g., Undo, View)

### 3.2 Inline Notifications (Contextual)

**Use For:** Page-specific alerts, form validation, workflow status

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ⚠ Warning                                           │
│ 3 trains are approaching PM threshold this week.    │
│ Review the PM schedule to ensure timely service.    │
│                              [View Schedule]        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Specifications:**
- Position: Top of relevant content area
- Dismissible: Yes (with × button)
- Persistence: Until dismissed or condition resolved
- Actions: Up to 2 CTAs

### 3.3 Actionable Notifications (Require Response)

**Use For:** Critical alerts requiring user decision

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ⛔ Critical: PM Overdue                             │
│                                                     │
│ Train KS-045 has exceeded PM2 threshold by 1,234    │
│ km. Immediate action required.                      │
│                                                     │
│ Current Mileage: 46,234 km                         │
│ PM2 Threshold: 45,000 km                           │
│ Overdue By: 1,234 km (2.7%)                        │
│                                                     │
│ [Schedule PM Now]  [Defer with Approval]  [Dismiss] │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Specifications:**
- Position: Top of page or modal
- Dismissible: Yes (but logged)
- Persistence: Until action taken
- Actions: Up to 3 CTAs
- Audit: All dismissals logged

### 3.4 Modal Notifications (Blocking)

**Use For:** Critical decisions, confirmations with consequences

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                   × │
│         ⚠ Confirm Schedule Override                 │
│                                                     │
│  You are about to override the AI recommendation    │
│  for Route R-RED-01.                               │
│                                                     │
│  AI Suggested: KS-012 (Score: 87%)                 │
│  Your Selection: KS-045 (Score: 62%)               │
│                                                     │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ Reason for override (required):                │ │
│  │ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │
│  │ │ Customer requested specific train          │ │ │
│  │ └───────────────────────────────────────────┘ │ │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                     │
│              [Cancel]  [Confirm Override]           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Notification Center

### 4.1 Notification Center Panel

**Access:** Bell icon in header with badge count

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🔔 Notifications                         [Mark All]│
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [All] [Unread (7)] [Critical (2)] [Actions (3)]     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                     │
│ ● Today                                             │
│ ├─ 🔴 PM Overdue: KS-045                 2 min ago │
│ │      Exceeded PM2 by 1,234 km                    │
│ │      [Schedule PM] [View Details]                │
│ │                                                  │
│ ├─ 🟡 Mileage Overrun: AL-012            15 min ago│
│ │      Train at 112% of monthly target             │
│ │      [View Analysis]                             │
│ │                                                  │
│ ├─ 🔵 Schedule Published                 1 hr ago  │
│ │      Tomorrow's schedule is now active           │
│ │                                                  │
│ ○ Yesterday                                         │
│ ├─ 🟡 Budget Warning: Parts               3:42 PM  │
│ │      Spare parts at 96% of monthly budget        │
│ │      [View Budget]                               │
│ │                                                  │
│ └─ 🟢 PM Completed: AL-078                2:15 PM  │
│        PM1 completed successfully                   │
│                                                     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│               [View All Notifications]              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 4.2 Badge Behavior

| Condition | Badge Display |
|-----------|---------------|
| No unread | No badge |
| 1-9 unread | Number shown |
| 10-99 unread | Number shown |
| 100+ unread | "99+" shown |
| Critical unread | Red badge with pulse animation |

### 4.3 Notification List View (Full Page)

**Route:** `/notifications`

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Notifications                                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│ Filters:                                                        │
│ ┌─────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌───────────┐ ┌──────────────────────┐│
│ │Category▼│ │ Priority▼│ │  Status ▼ │ │ Jan 1 - Jan 8, 2026  ││
│ └─────────┘ └──────────┘ └───────────┘ └──────────────────────┘│
│                                                                 │
│ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│ │ 🔍 Search notifications...                                │  │
│ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                                                 │
│ Actions: [Mark All Read] [Clear Resolved] [Export]              │
│                                                                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ☐ │ Priority │ Category    │ Message              │ Time       │
├───┼──────────┼─────────────┼──────────────────────┼────────────┤
│ ☐ │ 🔴 P1    │ Maintenance │ PM Overdue: KS-045   │ 2 min ago  │
│ ☐ │ 🟡 P2    │ Mileage     │ Overrun: AL-012      │ 15 min ago │
│ ☑ │ 🔵 P3    │ Assignment  │ Schedule Published   │ 1 hr ago   │
│ ☑ │ 🟡 P2    │ Cost        │ Budget Warning       │ Yesterday  │
│ ☑ │ 🟢 P4    │ Maintenance │ PM Completed: AL-078 │ Yesterday  │
└───┴──────────┴─────────────┴──────────────────────┴────────────┘
```

---

## 5. Delivery Channels

### 5.1 Channel Matrix

| Alert Type | In-App | Push | Email | SMS |
|------------|--------|------|-------|-----|
| PM Overdue (P1) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| PM Critical (P1) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Optional |
| PM Approaching (P2) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | - |
| Mileage Overrun (P2) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | - |
| Mileage Underrun (P2) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | - |
| Assignment Conflict (P2) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | - |
| Budget Warning (P2) | ✓ | - | ✓ | - |
| PM Completed (P4) | ✓ | - | Digest | - |
| Info Notifications (P3) | ✓ | - | Digest | - |

### 5.2 Push Notification Format

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 🚂 Rolling Stock Mileage                    │
│                                             │
│ PM Overdue: KS-045                         │
│ Train exceeded PM2 threshold by 1,234 km.  │
│ Tap to take action.                        │
│                                   12:34 PM │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Character Limits:**
- Title: 50 characters
- Body: 150 characters
- Include train ID and key metric

### 5.3 Email Notification Template

```
Subject: [CRITICAL] PM Overdue: Train KS-045 - Action Required

─────────────────────────────────────────────

Rolling Stock Mileage Management

CRITICAL ALERT: PM Overdue

Train KS-045 has exceeded the PM2 maintenance threshold.

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Train ID:        KS-045                     │
│ Fleet:           Kinki Sharyo              │
│ Current Mileage: 46,234 km                 │
│ PM2 Threshold:   45,000 km                 │
│ Overdue By:      1,234 km (2.7%)          │
│ Last PM:         2025-11-15               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘

RECOMMENDED ACTION:
Schedule PM2 maintenance immediately to ensure
compliance and prevent equipment damage.

[Schedule PM Now]  [View Train Details]

─────────────────────────────────────────────

This alert was sent to: maintenance@railoperator.com
Alert generated: Jan 8, 2026 12:34 PM UTC

Manage notification preferences: [Settings]
Unsubscribe from this alert type: [Unsubscribe]
```

**Sent:** 6:00 AM local time (configurable)

```

─────────────────────────────────────────────

Rolling Stock Mileage Management

```

---

## 6. Escalation Workflow

### 6.1 Escalation Tiers

```
TIER 1 (Immediate)
├── Notification to: Assigned user/team
├── Channels: In-app + Push + Email
├── Wait time: 15 minutes
└── If not acknowledged → TIER 2

TIER 2 (Supervisor)
├── Notification to: Team supervisor
├── Channels: In-app + Push + Email + SMS
├── Wait time: 30 minutes
└── If not acknowledged → TIER 3

TIER 3 (Management)
├── Notification to: Department manager
├── Channels: All channels
├── Wait time: 1 hour
└── If not acknowledged → TIER 4

TIER 4 (Executive)
├── Notification to: Operations director
├── Channels: All channels + Phone call
└── Tracked until resolved
```

### 6.2 Escalation Matrix

| Alert Type | Tier 1 | Tier 2 | Tier 3 | Tier 4 |
|------------|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| PM Overdue | Maintenance Tech | Maintenance Sup | Maintenance Mgr | Ops Director |
| Track Overbooked | Scheduler | Planning Sup | Planning Mgr | Ops Director |
| No Suitable Train | Dispatcher | Ops Supervisor | Ops Manager | Ops Director |
| Budget Exceeded | Accountant | Finance Sup | Finance Mgr | CFO |
| Integration Failure | IT Support | IT Lead | IT Manager | CTO |

### 6.3 Acknowledgment Actions

| Action | Effect |
|--------|--------|
| Acknowledge | Stops escalation, marks as "In Progress" |
| Defer | Reschedules alert for later, requires reason |
| Resolve | Closes alert, updates status |
| Escalate | Manually escalates to next tier |
| Reassign | Assigns to different user/team |

---

## 8. Alert Actions & Workflows

### 8.1 Quick Actions

|--------|------|-------------|
| Schedule PM | 📅 | Opens PM scheduling modal |
| View Train | 🚂 | Navigates to train details |
| View Analysis | 📊 | Opens relevant analysis view |
| Acknowledge | ✓ | Marks alert as acknowledged |
| Snooze | 💤 | Delays reminder (15m/1h/4h/Tomorrow) |
| Dismiss | × | Dismisses (logs action) |
| Share | 📤 | Shares via email/Slack |
| Comment | 💬 | Adds comment for audit |

---

## 9. Notification Sounds & Haptics

### 9.1 Sound Configuration

| Priority | Default Sound | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| P1 Critical | Urgent alarm (3 beeps) | Cannot be muted |
| P2 Warning | Alert tone (2 beeps) | Can be muted |
| P3 Info | Subtle chime (1 beep) | Can be muted |
| P4 Success | Soft ping | Can be muted |

### 9.2 Mobile Haptics

| Priority | Haptic Pattern |
|----------|----------------|
| P1 Critical | Strong vibration (3x) |
| P2 Warning | Medium vibration (2x) |
| P3 Info | Light vibration (1x) |
| P4 Success | Subtle tap |

---

## 10. Accessibility

### 10.1 WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance

- **Color**: Not sole indicator; icons + text labels
- **Contrast**: 4.5:1 minimum for text
- **Focus**: Visible focus indicators
- **Screen Readers**: ARIA live regions for dynamic notifications
- **Keyboard**: Full keyboard navigation

### 10.2 ARIA Implementation

```html
<!-- Toast Notification -->
<div role="alert" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true">
  <span class="sr-only">Success notification:</span>
  Assignment saved successfully
</div>

<!-- Critical Alert -->
<div role="alertdialog" aria-live="assertive" aria-modal="true">
  <span class="sr-only">Critical alert:</span>
  PM Overdue: KS-045 requires immediate attention
</div>

<!-- Notification Badge -->
<button aria-label="Notifications, 7 unread items">
  <span class="badge">7</span>
</button>
```

---

## 11. Gestalt Principles Applied

### 11.1 Proximity
- Group related actions together
- Alert metadata clustered (time, category, priority)
- Settings grouped by function

### 11.2 Similarity
- Consistent color coding across all notification types
- Uniform button styles for actions
- Same icon language throughout

### 11.3 Enclosure
- Clear card boundaries for each notification
- Panel borders for notification center
- Modal frames for critical alerts

### 11.4 Continuity
- Left-to-right reading flow for actions
- Timeline ordering (newest first)
- Escalation tier visual progression

### 11.5 Figure-Ground
- Elevated toast notifications (shadow)
- Modal overlay for blocking alerts
- Unread vs read visual differentiation

### 11.6 Common Fate
- Batch selection animations
- Grouped notification bundling
- Synchronized dismiss animations

---

## 12. States & Transitions

### 12.1 Notification States

| State | Visual Treatment |
|-------|------------------|
| Unread | Bold text, colored indicator dot |
| Read | Normal weight, no indicator |
| Acknowledged | Checkmark icon, muted colors |
| Snoozed | Clock icon, italic text |
| Resolved | Strikethrough, light gray |
| Escalated | Red border, escalation indicator |

### 12.2 Animation Specifications

| Animation | Duration | Easing |
|-----------|----------|--------|
| Toast enter | 300ms | ease-out |
| Toast exit | 200ms | ease-in |
| Badge pulse | 1000ms | ease-in-out (loop) |
| Mark read | 150ms | ease-out |
| Dismiss | 200ms | ease-in |
| Expand/collapse | 200ms | ease-out |

---

## 13. Integration Points

### 13.1 External Systems

| System | Integration Type | Alert Types |
|--------|------------------|-------------|
| Maximo | Bi-directional | Work orders, asset status |
| Email Server | Outbound | All email notifications |
| SMS Gateway | Outbound | P1 critical alerts |
| Slack/Teams | Outbound (webhook) | Configurable |
| Mobile App | Push (FCM/APNs) | All push notifications |

    { "id": "view", "label": "View Details", "url": "/trains/KS-045" }
  ]
}
```

## 14. Analytics & Metrics

### 14.1 Key Metrics

| Metric | Description | Target |
|--------|-------------|--------|
| Acknowledgment Rate | % alerts acknowledged | >90% |
| Response Time | Time to first action | <15 min (P1) |
| Escalation Rate | % alerts escalated | <10% |
| Dismiss Rate | % alerts dismissed without action | <20% |
| Channel Effectiveness | Opens per channel | Track trend |

### 14.2 Alert Dashboard Metrics

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Alert Analytics - Last 30 Days                                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│ Total Alerts: 1,234    Acknowledged: 1,111 (90%)               │
│                                                                 │
│ By Priority:           By Category:                            │
│ P1: 23 (2%)           Maintenance: 456 (37%)                   │
│ P2: 345 (28%)         Mileage: 321 (26%)                       │
│ P3: 567 (46%)         Assignment: 234 (19%)                    │
│ P4: 299 (24%)         Other: 223 (18%)                         │
│                                                                 │
│ Avg Response Time:     Escalation Rate:                        │
│ P1: 8 min ✓           5.2% ✓                                   │
│ P2: 2.3 hr ✓          3.1% ✓                                   │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 15. Unknown Unknowns (Risks & Considerations)

### Identified During Design

1. **Alert Fatigue Threshold**: At what point do users start ignoring alerts?
2. **Cross-Shift Handoff**: How to handle alerts during shift changes?
3. **Timezone Handling**: Users in different timezones seeing same alerts
4. **Alert Correlation**: Related alerts should be grouped (e.g., PM overdue + budget impact)
5. **False Positive Rate**: Threshold tuning to reduce noise
6. **Network Reliability**: Push notification delivery in low-connectivity areas
7. **Audit Requirements**: How long to retain alert history?
8. **GDPR Compliance**: User data in notifications
9. **Multi-Language Support**: Alert content localization
10. **Role Change Impact**: What happens to subscriptions when role changes?
11. **Delegation During Absence**: Auto-forwarding when user is OOO
12. **Alert Storm Prevention**: Cascade prevention when system failure affects many trains
13. **Acknowledgment Verification**: Ensuring the right person acknowledged
14. **Alert De-duplication**: Same condition triggering multiple alerts
15. **Historical Alert Replay**: Ability to replay alerts for training
16. **Alert Priority Override**: Can users elevate/demote priorities?
17. **Integration Failure Alerts**: What if Maximo sync fails silently?
18. **Mobile App Permissions**: Users denying notification permissions
19. **Email Deliverability**: Alerts going to spam folders
20. **Alert Content Security**: Sensitive data in notification bodies

---

## 16. Responsive Design

### 16.1 Desktop (>=1200px)
- Full notification center panel (400px width)
- Inline notifications span content width
- Modal notifications centered (max 500px width)

### 16.2 Tablet (768px - 1199px)
- Notification panel as slide-over
- Condensed notification cards
- Touch-friendly action buttons

### 16.3 Mobile (<768px)
- Full-screen notification center
- Swipe gestures for quick actions
- Bottom sheet for actions menu
- Large touch targets (48px minimum)

---

## 17. Implementation Notes

### 17.1 Technology Stack Recommendations

| Component | Recommended Tech |
|-----------|------------------|
| Real-time delivery | WebSocket / Server-Sent Events |
| Push notifications | Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) |
| Email delivery | SendGrid / AWS SES |
| SMS delivery | Twilio |
| Message queue | RabbitMQ / AWS SQS |
| State management | Redux / Zustand |
| Animations | Framer Motion |

### 17.2 Performance Targets

| Metric | Target |
|--------|--------|
| Notification render | <100ms |
| WebSocket connection | <500ms |
| Push delivery | <2 seconds |
| Email delivery | <30 seconds |
| SMS delivery | <10 seconds |
| Panel load (100 items) | <200ms |

---

| Version | Date | Changes |
|---------|------|---------|
| 1.0 | 2026-01-08 | Initial specification |

   401→## 7. Offline-First Design
   402→
   403→### 7.1 App Shell Architecture
   404→
   405→```
   406→┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
   407→│ [Logo]                     [🔔][👤]    │  ← Cached (Shell)
   408→├────────────────────────────────────────┤
   409→│                                        │
   410→│  ┌────────────────────────────────┐   │
   411→│  │                                │   │
   412→│  │     DYNAMIC CONTENT            │   │  ← Fetched/Cached
   413→│  │     (API data)                 │   │
   414→│  │                                │   │
   415→│  └────────────────────────────────┘   │
   416→│                                        │
   417→├────────────────────────────────────────┤
   418→│  🏠     🚂     📅     📊     ☰       │  ← Cached (Shell)
   419→└────────────────────────────────────────┘
   420→```
   421→
   422→### 7.2 Caching Strategy
   423→
   424→| Data Type | Cache Strategy | Staleness |
   425→|-----------|----------------|-----------|
   426→| App shell (HTML/CSS/JS) | Cache first | Immediate update |
   427→| Train list | Stale-while-revalidate | 5 minutes |
   428→| Mileage data | Stale-while-revalidate | 1 hour |
   429→| PM schedules | Network first, cache fallback | Real-time |
   430→| User preferences | Cache first | On change |
   431→| Images/icons | Cache first | Weekly update |
   432→
   433→### 7.3 Offline Indicators
   434→
   435→**Header offline indicator:**
   436→```
   437→┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
   438→│ ⚡ Offline - Changes will sync when... │
   439→└────────────────────────────────────────┘
   440→```
   441→
   442→**Per-item sync status:**
   443→```
   444→┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
   445→│ KS-045                   ⏳ Syncing... │
   446→│ Mileage updated to 46,234 km          │
   447→└────────────────────────────────────────┘
   448→
   449→┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
   450→│ KS-046                   ✓ Synced      │
   451→│ Assignment confirmed                   │
   452→└────────────────────────────────────────┘
   453→```
   454→
   455→### 7.4 Optimistic UI Updates
   456→
   457→```
   458→User Action: Record mileage for KS-045
   459→
   460→1. Immediate UI update (optimistic)
   461→   ┌────────────────────────────────────┐
   462→   │ ✓ Mileage recorded: 46,234 km     │
   463→   └────────────────────────────────────┘
   464→
   465→2. Background sync attempt
   466→   - If online: Confirm with server
   467→   - If offline: Queue for later sync
   468→
   469→3. On sync failure: Show retry option
   470→   ┌────────────────────────────────────┐
   471→   │ ⚠ Failed to sync mileage         │
   472→   │ [Retry]  [Discard]                │
   473→   └────────────────────────────────────┘
   474→```
   475→
   476→### 7.5 Offline-Available Features
   477→
   478→| Feature | Offline Support | Notes |
   479→|---------|-----------------|-------|
   480→| View train list | ✓ Full | Cached data |
   481→| View train details | ✓ Full | Cached data |
   482→| Record daily mileage | ✓ Queue | Syncs when online |
   483→| View PM schedule | ✓ Full | Cached data |
   484→| Create assignment | ✓ Queue | Syncs when online |
   485→| View notifications | ✓ Partial | Cached recent |
   486→| Generate reports | ✗ No | Requires server |
   487→| Run simulations | ✗ No | Requires server |
   488→

   491→## 8. Field Worker Optimizations
   492→
   493→### 8.1 Environmental Considerations
   494→
   495→Based on railway maintenance UX research:
   496→
   497→| Challenge | Solution |
   498→|-----------|----------|
   499→| Poor lighting | High contrast mode, larger fonts |
   500→| Gloves | Larger touch targets (64px+) |
   501→| Dirty screens | Simple swipe gestures, avoid multi-touch |
   502→| Attention span | Progressive disclosure, highlight key info |
   503→| Eyeglasses | Avoid small text (<16px) |
   504→| Outdoor glare | Dark mode option, high contrast |
   505→
   506→### 8.2 High Contrast Mode
   507→
   508→```css
   509→@media (prefers-contrast: more) {
   510→  :root {
   511→    --bg-primary: #000000;
   512→    --bg-secondary: #1a1a1a;
   513→    --text-primary: #ffffff;
   514→    --text-secondary: #e0e0e0;
   515→    --accent-color: #ffcc00;
   516→    --error-color: #ff4444;
   517→    --success-color: #44ff44;
   518→  }
   519→}
   520→```

   753→
   754→## 11. Performance Optimization
   755→
   756→### 11.1 Performance Budgets
   757→
   758→| Metric | Target | Mobile 3G |
   759→|--------|--------|-----------|
   760→| First Contentful Paint | <1.5s | <3s |
   761→| Largest Contentful Paint | <2.5s | <4s |
   762→| Time to Interactive | <3.5s | <7s |
   763→| Total Blocking Time | <200ms | <600ms |
   764→| Cumulative Layout Shift | <0.1 | <0.1 |
   765→| Bundle size (gzipped) | <200KB | <200KB |
   766→
   767→### 11.2 Optimization Techniques
   768→
   769→| Technique | Implementation |
   770→|-----------|----------------|
   771→| Code splitting | Route-based lazy loading |
   772→| Image optimization | WebP format, srcset |
   773→| Critical CSS | Inline above-fold styles |
   774→| Prefetching | Priority routes |
   775→| Skeleton screens | Show immediately while loading |
   776→| Virtual scrolling | For long lists (128 trains) |
   777→
   778→### 11.3 Skeleton Loading States
   779→
   780→```
   781→┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
   782→│ ████████████████                       │
   783→│ Kinki Sharyo                           │
   784→├────────────────────────────────────────┤
   785→│ ████████   │ ████████████  │ ████      │
   786→│            │               │           │
   787→├────────────────────────────────────────┤
   788→│ ████████████████████████               │
   789→│ ████████████████████                   │
   790→├────────────────────────────────────────┤
   791→│ ████████████        ████████████       │
   792→└────────────────────────────────────────┘
   793→```
   794→
   795→---
   796→
   797→## 12. Accessibility (Mobile)
   798→
   799→### 12.1 Screen Reader Support
   800→
   801→```html
   802→<!-- Train card -->
   803→<article
   804→  role="article"
   805→  aria-label="Train KS-045, Kinki Sharyo fleet, 95% PM window, Warning status"
   806→>
   807→  <h3 id="train-title-045">KS-045</h3>
   808→  <p aria-describedby="train-title-045">Kinki Sharyo</p>
   809→
   810→  <div role="meter" aria-valuenow="95" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100">
   811→    PM Window: 95%
   812→  </div>
   813→
   814→  <button aria-label="View details for train KS-045">
   815→    View Details
   816→  </button>
   817→</article>
   818→```
   819→
   820→### 12.2 Focus Management
   821→
   822→- Trap focus in modals/bottom sheets
   823→- Return focus to trigger element on close
   824→- Visible focus indicators (4px outline)
   825→- Skip-to-content link
   826→
   827→### 12.3 Reduced Motion
   828→
   829→```css
   830→@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   831→  *,
   832→  *::before,
   833→  *::after {
   834→    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
   835→    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
   836→    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
   837→  }
   838→}
   839→```
   840→
   841→---
   842→
   843→## 13. Testing Checklist
   844→
   845→### 13.1 Device Testing Matrix
   846→
   847→| Device | OS | Browser | Priority |
   848→|--------|----|---------|---------|
   849→| iPhone 14 Pro | iOS 17 | Safari | High |
   850→| iPhone SE | iOS 17 | Safari | High |
   851→| iPad Pro 12.9" | iPadOS 17 | Safari | High |
   852→| Samsung Galaxy S23 | Android 14 | Chrome | High |
   853→| Pixel 7 | Android 14 | Chrome | Medium |
   854→| iPad Air | iPadOS 17 | Safari | Medium |
   855→| Samsung Tab S9 | Android 14 | Chrome | Medium |
   856→
   857→### 13.2 Test Scenarios
   858→
   859→| Scenario | Test Method |
   860→|----------|-------------|
   861→| Offline functionality | Airplane mode toggle |
   862→| Slow network | Chrome DevTools throttling |
   863→| Touch targets | Manual testing with fingers |
   864→| Orientation change | Device rotation |
   865→| Keyboard navigation | External keyboard |
   866→| Screen reader | VoiceOver / TalkBack |
   867→| PWA install | Add to home screen |
   868→| Background sync | Network restoration |
   869→
   870→---
   871→
   872→## 14. Gestalt Principles (Mobile)
   873→
   874→### 14.1 Proximity
   875→- Group related actions in bottom sheets
   876→- Cluster form fields logically
   877→- Maintain consistent spacing
   878→
   879→### 14.2 Similarity
   880→- Consistent card styling across views
   881→- Uniform icon language
   882→- Same color coding for status
   883→
   884→### 14.3 Enclosure
   885→- Cards with clear boundaries
   886→- Bottom sheet modal frames
   887→- Section separators
   888→
   889→### 14.4 Continuity
   890→- Smooth scroll animations
   891→- Gesture continuity (swipe flow)
   892→- Consistent navigation direction
   893→
   894→### 14.5 Figure-Ground
   895→- Elevated bottom sheets (shadow)
   896→- Modal overlay dimming
   897→- Active tab highlighting
   898→
   899→### 14.6 Common Fate
   900→- List items scroll together
   901→- Synchronized pull-to-refresh
   902→- Batch selection animations
   903→
   904→---
   905→
   906→## 15. Unknown Unknowns (Risks & Considerations)
   907→
   908→### Identified During Design
   909→
   910→1. **Data usage concerns**: Field workers may have limited data plans
   911→2. **Battery consumption**: Background sync impact on battery
   912→3. **Device fragmentation**: Android device diversity
   913→4. **Network reliability**: Rural/underground coverage gaps
   914→5. **PWA limitations**: iOS restrictions on background processing
   915→6. **Biometric auth**: Device-specific implementation differences
   916→7. **Camera quality**: QR scanning in poor lighting
   917→8. **Screen size extremes**: Very large tablets, foldables
   918→9. **Rugged device support**: Industrial-grade tablets
   919→10. **Multi-window support**: Split-screen on tablets
   920→11. **Handedness**: Left-handed users and navigation
   921→12. **Accessibility zoom**: Text scaling impact on layout
   922→13. **Dark mode sync**: System vs app preference
   923→14. **Update mechanism**: PWA update prompts
   924→15. **Storage limits**: Browser cache limits
   925→16. **Cross-device sync**: Session continuity
   926→17. **Print from mobile**: Report printing support
   927→18. **External keyboard**: Tablet with keyboard use case
   928→19. **Landscape lock**: Specific views that need landscape
   929→20. **Deep linking**: Navigation from push notifications
   930→
   931→---
   932→
   933→## 16. Implementation Checklist
   934→
   935→### Phase 1: Foundation
   936→- [ ] Set up responsive breakpoints
   937→- [ ] Implement mobile navigation
   938→- [ ] Create base card components
   939→- [ ] Set up PWA manifest
   940→
   941→### Phase 2: Core Features
   942→- [ ] Mobile dashboard view
   943→- [ ] Train list (cards)
   944→- [ ] Train detail view
   945→- [ ] Basic offline support
   946→
   947→### Phase 3: Field Worker
   948→- [ ] Quick check-in flow
   949→- [ ] Mileage entry (offline)
   950→- [ ] Task list view
   951→- [ ] QR code scanning
   952→
   953→### Phase 4: Advanced
   954→- [ ] Full offline sync
   955→- [ ] Push notifications
   956→- [ ] Background sync
   957→- [ ] Role-based views
   958→
   959→### Phase 5: Polish
   960→- [ ] Performance optimization
   961→- [ ] Accessibility audit
   962→- [ ] Device testing
   963→- [ ] PWA install flow
   964→
   965→---
   966→
   967→## 17. Change Log
   968→
   969→| Version | Date | Changes |
   970→|---------|------|---------|
   971→| 1.0 | 2026-01-08 | Initial specification |
   972→
   973→---
   974→
   975→*Document prepared for MILEAGE-UX-010*
   976→*Rolling Stock Mileage Management System*
   977→

# Mobile Responsive Design UX Specification

## MILEAGE-UX-010 - Rolling Stock Mileage Management

**Version:** 1.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-01-08
**Status:** Complete

---

## 1. Overview

### Purpose
Define mobile-responsive design patterns for the Rolling Stock Mileage Management platform, enabling field access for operations and maintenance personnel while maintaining full functionality across all device sizes.

### Scope
- 128 trains (49 Kinki Sharyo + 79 Alstom)
- RFQ Section 6: "The web-based software shall be compatible with mainstream web browsers and shall be accessible on desktops and mobile devices."
- Support for Operations, Maintenance, and Management roles on mobile
- Offline-first capability for field environments

### Design Principles
1. **Mobile-First**: Design for smallest screens first, then enhance
2. **Progressive Enhancement**: Basic functionality works everywhere
3. **Touch-Friendly**: Minimum 48px touch targets
4. **Offline-First**: Core features available without connectivity
5. **Performance**: Fast load times on 3G networks
6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance on all devices

### Sources Referenced
- [Hicron: Fleet Management Dashboard Design](https://hicronsoftware.com/blog/fleet-management-dashboard-design/)
- [Volpis: UX Design of Fleet Management Apps](https://volpis.com/blog/user-experience-design-of-fleet-management-apps/)
- [Standard Beagle: Fleet Tablet App Design](https://standardbeagle.com/case-studies/fleet-tablet-app-design/)
- [Medium: Railway Maintenance SaaS UX Design](https://medium.com/@kirillgorban/smart-maintenance-saas-solution-for-railroad-switches-ux-design-approach-cd2c9851af4c)
- [Google: PWA Offline-First Architecture](https://developers.google.com/codelabs/pwa-training/pwa03--going-offline)
- [MDN: Offline and Background Operation](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/Guides/Offline_and_background_operation)

---

## 2. Responsive Breakpoints

### 2.1 Breakpoint Definitions

| Breakpoint | Width | Target Devices | Layout |
|------------|-------|----------------|--------|
| xs (Mobile) | <576px | iPhone SE, small phones | Single column |
| sm (Mobile Large) | 576-767px | iPhone 14, large phones | Single column |
| md (Tablet Portrait) | 768-991px | iPad portrait | 2-column |
| lg (Tablet Landscape) | 992-1199px | iPad landscape, small laptops | 3-column |
| xl (Desktop) | 1200-1399px | Standard monitors | Full layout |
| xxl (Desktop Large) | >=1400px | Large monitors, 4K | Full layout |

### 2.2 CSS Variables

```css
:root {
  /* Breakpoints */
  --breakpoint-xs: 0;
  --breakpoint-sm: 576px;
  --breakpoint-md: 768px;
  --breakpoint-lg: 992px;
  --breakpoint-xl: 1200px;
  --breakpoint-xxl: 1400px;

  /* Touch targets */
  --touch-target-min: 48px;
  --touch-target-comfortable: 56px;

  /* Spacing */
  --spacing-xs: 4px;
  --spacing-sm: 8px;
  --spacing-md: 16px;
  --spacing-lg: 24px;
  --spacing-xl: 32px;

  /* Typography (mobile-first) */
  --font-size-base: 16px;
  --font-size-sm: 14px;
  --font-size-xs: 12px;
  --font-size-lg: 18px;
  --font-size-xl: 20px;
  --font-size-h1: 24px;
  --font-size-h2: 20px;
  --font-size-h3: 18px;
}
```

---

## 3. Navigation Patterns

### 3.1 Desktop Navigation (>=992px)

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [Logo]   Dashboard  Trains  Schedule  Compliance  Reports    [🔔][👤]│
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- Horizontal top navigation bar
- Dropdown menus for sub-sections
- Fixed position (sticky)
- User profile and notifications in top-right

### 3.2 Tablet Navigation (768px-991px)

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [☰]  [Logo]                                              [🔔][👤] │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Dashboard │ Trains │ Schedule │ Compliance │ Reports              │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- Condensed horizontal tabs
- Hamburger menu for secondary items
- Icons with abbreviated labels

### 3.3 Mobile Navigation (<768px)

**Bottom Tab Bar (Primary Navigation)**

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                        │
│              [CONTENT]                 │
│                                        │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  🏠      🚂      📅      📊      ☰   │
│ Home   Trains  Schedule Alerts  More  │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- 5 tabs maximum (iOS/Android guidelines)
- Active state: Filled icon + label
- Inactive state: Outline icon only
- Safe area padding for notched devices

**Hamburger Slide-Out Menu (Secondary Navigation)**

```
┌──────────────────┬─────────────────────┐
│                  │                     │
│  [👤] John Doe   │                     │
│  Operations      │                     │
│                  │                     │
│  ─────────────── │                     │
│  📊 Dashboard    │     [CONTENT]       │
│  🚂 Trains       │                     │
│  📅 Schedule     │     (dimmed)        │
│  ✓  Compliance   │                     │
│  📄 Reports      │                     │
│  📈 Analytics    │                     │
│  ─────────────── │                     │
│  ⚙️ Settings     │                     │
│  ❓ Help         │                     │
│  🚪 Logout       │                     │
│                  │                     │
└──────────────────┴─────────────────────┘
```

- Swipe-to-close gesture
- Overlay dims main content (60% opacity)
- Current section highlighted
- User profile at top

---

## 4. Layout Patterns

### 4.1 Card-Based Layout (Mobile)

Replace data tables with cards on mobile:

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ KS-045                      🟡 Warning │
│ Kinki Sharyo                           │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Mileage    │ PM Window    │ Status     │
│ 46,234 km  │ 95% ███████░ │ FIT        │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Next PM: PM2 in 3 days                 │
│ Route: R-BLUE-01 (today)               │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [View Details]        [Schedule PM]    │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ AL-012                      🔴 Critical│
│ Alstom                                 │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ...                                    │
```

### 4.2 Collapsible Sections

For complex data on small screens:

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Fleet Summary                      [▼] │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Total Trains: 128                      │
│ Available: 112                         │
│ In Maintenance: 16                     │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ PM Status                          [▶] │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Mileage Alerts                     [▶] │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 4.3 Horizontal Scroll for Tables

When table data is essential:

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ← Train ID  │ Mileage   │ PM Wind... → │
├─────────────┼───────────┼──────────────┤
│ KS-001      │ 42,156 km │ 72%          │
│ KS-002      │ 43,892 km │ 81%          │
│ KS-003      │ 41,234 km │ 68%          │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
       ● ○ ○ (scroll indicators)
```

- Sticky first column (Train ID)
- Horizontal scroll indicator dots
- Swipe gesture to reveal more columns

---

## 5. Component Adaptations

### 5.1 Dashboard KPI Cards

**Desktop (4 cards per row)**
```
┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐
│ Fleet    │ │ PM       │ │ Budget   │ │ Mileage  │
│ Avail.   │ │ Compl.   │ │ Compl.   │ │ Balance  │
│ 87%      │ │ 94%      │ │ 96%      │ │ 92%      │
│ ↑ 2%     │ │ ↓ 1%     │ │ → 0%     │ │ ↑ 3%     │
└──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘
```

**Tablet (2 cards per row)**
```
┌────────────────────┐ ┌────────────────────┐
│ Fleet Availability │ │ PM Compliance      │
│ 87%     ↑ 2%      │ │ 94%     ↓ 1%      │
└────────────────────┘ └────────────────────┘
┌────────────────────┐ ┌────────────────────┐
│ Budget Compliance  │ │ Mileage Balance    │
│ 96%     → 0%      │ │ 92%     ↑ 3%      │
└────────────────────┘ └────────────────────┘
```

**Mobile (Horizontal scroll carousel)**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ┌───────────┐  ┌───────────┐          │
│  │ Fleet     │  │ PM        │  [...]   │
│  │ Avail.    │  │ Compl.    │          │
│  │ 87%  ↑2%  │  │ 94%  ↓1%  │          │
│  └───────────┘  └───────────┘          │
│             ● ● ○ ○                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 5.2 Charts

**Desktop: Full interactive charts**

**Tablet: Simplified charts with touch zoom**

**Mobile: Sparklines + Tap to expand**

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Man-Hour Utilization                   │
│ ▂▃▅▇▆▄▃▅▆▇▅▄  Current: 89%           │
│                                        │
│ [Tap to view full chart]               │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 5.3 Date Pickers

**Desktop: Calendar dropdown**

**Mobile: Native date picker**
- Use `<input type="date">` for system date picker
- Respects user's locale and format preferences
- Better keyboard support

### 5.4 Filters

**Desktop: Inline filter bar**
```
[Fleet Type ▼] [Status ▼] [PM Due ▼] [🔍 Search...]
```

**Mobile: Filter bottom sheet**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              [━━━]                     │
│            Filters                     │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Fleet Type                             │
│ ○ All  ● Kinki Sharyo  ○ Alstom       │
│                                        │
│ Status                                 │
│ [✓] Available  [✓] In Service         │
│ [ ] Maintenance  [ ] Out of Service   │
│                                        │
│ PM Due                                 │
│ ○ All  ○ This Week  ○ This Month      │
│                                        │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [Clear All]              [Apply (24)]  │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- Pull-down to dismiss
- Result count preview
- Sticky apply button

### 5.5 Action Buttons

**Desktop: Full text buttons**
```
[Schedule PM]  [View Details]  [Edit Assignment]
```

**Mobile: Icon buttons with labels on tap**
```
┌──────┐  ┌──────┐  ┌──────┐
│  📅  │  │  👁️  │  │  ✏️  │
│      │  │      │  │      │
└──────┘  └──────┘  └──────┘
Schedule   View     Edit
```

- Long-press for tooltip
- Icon + short label below

---

## 6. Touch Interactions

### 6.1 Touch Targets

| Element | Minimum Size | Comfortable Size |
|---------|--------------|------------------|
| Buttons | 48x48px | 56x56px |
| List items | 48px height | 56px height |
| Form inputs | 48px height | 56px height |
| Tab bar items | 48x48px | 64px wide |
| Checkboxes | 24x24px (44px touch) | 32x32px |
| Radio buttons | 24x24px (44px touch) | 32x32px |

### 6.2 Gestures

| Gesture | Action |
|---------|--------|
| Tap | Select, activate |
| Long press | Context menu, drag start |
| Swipe right | Mark as done, reveal actions |
| Swipe left | Delete, archive |
| Pull down | Refresh |
| Pinch | Zoom (charts, maps) |
| Two-finger scroll | Horizontal scroll in tables |

### 6.3 Swipe Actions on List Items

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ← ←     │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │  [🗑️ Delete]    │ KS-045        │   │
│ │                 │ PM in 3 days  │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                        │
│  → → → → → → → → → → → → → → → →     │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ KS-045        │    [✓ Done]     │   │
│ │ PM in 3 days  │                 │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────┘   │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 7. Offline-First Design

### 7.1 App Shell Architecture

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [Logo]                     [🔔][👤]    │  ← Cached (Shell)
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                        │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │                                │   │
│  │     DYNAMIC CONTENT            │   │  ← Fetched/Cached
│  │     (API data)                 │   │
│  │                                │   │
│  └────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                        │
├────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  🏠     🚂     📅     📊     ☰       │  ← Cached (Shell)
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 7.2 Caching Strategy

| Data Type | Cache Strategy | Staleness |
|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| App shell (HTML/CSS/JS) | Cache first | Immediate update |
| Train list | Stale-while-revalidate | 5 minutes |
| Mileage data | Stale-while-revalidate | 1 hour |
| PM schedules | Network first, cache fallback | Real-time |
| User preferences | Cache first | On change |
| Images/icons | Cache first | Weekly update |

### 7.3 Offline Indicators

**Header offline indicator:**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ⚡ Offline - Changes will sync when... │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Per-item sync status:**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ KS-045                   ⏳ Syncing... │
│ Mileage updated to 46,234 km          │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ KS-046                   ✓ Synced      │
│ Assignment confirmed                   │
└────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 7.4 Optimistic UI Updates

```
User Action: Record mileage for KS-045

1. Immediate UI update (optimistic)
   ┌────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ ✓ Mileage recorded: 46,234 km     │
   └────────────────────────────────────┘

2. Background sync attempt
   - If online: Confirm with server
   - If offline: Queue for later sync

3. On sync failure: Show retry option
   ┌────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ ⚠ Failed to sync mileage         │
   │ [Retry]  [Discard]                │
   └────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 7.5 Offline-Available Features

| Feature | Offline Support | Notes |
|---------|-----------------|-------|
| View train list | ✓ Full | Cached data |
| View train details | ✓ Full | Cached data |
| Record daily mileage | ✓ Queue | Syncs when online |
| View PM schedule | ✓ Full | Cached data |
| Create assignment | ✓ Queue | Syncs when online |
| View notifications | ✓ Partial | Cached recent |
| Generate reports | ✗ No | Requires server |
| Run simulations | ✗ No | Requires server |

---

## 8. Field Worker Optimizations

### 8.1 Environmental Considerations

Based on railway maintenance UX research:

| Challenge | Solution |
|-----------|----------|
| Poor lighting | High contrast mode, larger fonts |
| Gloves | Larger touch targets (64px+) |
| Dirty screens | Simple swipe gestures, avoid multi-touch |
| Attention span | Progressive disclosure, highlight key info |
| Eyeglasses | Avoid small text (<16px) |
| Outdoor glare | Dark mode option, high contrast |

### 8.2 High Contrast Mode

```css
@media (prefers-contrast: more) {
  :root {
    --bg-primary: #000000;
    --bg-secondary: #1a1a1a;
    --text-primary: #ffffff;
    --text-secondary: #e0e0e0;
    --accent-color: #ffcc00;
    --error-color: #ff4444;
    --success-color: #44ff44;
  }
}
```

### 8.3 Quick Actions for Field Workers

**Train check-in card (optimized for gloves):**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                        │
│              KS-045                    │
│           Kinki Sharyo                 │
│                                        │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │                                  │ │
│  │      📷 SCAN QR CODE            │ │
│  │                                  │ │
│  │      or enter manually          │ │
│  └──────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                                        │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │                                │   │
│  │        ✓ CHECK IN              │   │  ← 64px height
│  │                                │   │
│  └────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                        │
│  Current Mileage: 46,234 km           │
│  Last Checked: 2 hours ago            │
│                                        │
